# seerr_notification_agent (Resource)

Manage Seerr notification agent settings via /api/v1/settings/notifications/{agent}.



<!-- schema generated by tfplugindocs -->
## Schema

### Required

- `agent` (String)
- `payload_json` (String)

### Optional

- `delete_payload_json` (String)
- `disable_on_delete` (Boolean)

### Read-Only

- `id` (String) The ID of this resource.
- `response_json` (String)
- `status_code` (Number)
